title: Steering scenarios for the bracket
description:
Steering scenarios over the bracket reusing the existing eval harness: a plan rejected at the quality gate, a coverage gap caught at the breakdown gate, and a clean green path.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] A scenario asserts the plan-review gate blocks a deficient plan.
- [ ] A scenario asserts the breakdown gate blocks an uncovered hard criterion.
- [ ] A scenario asserts a well-formed bracket passes end-to-end.
